inputs.label: Volume (Stere)
inputs.businessContext: The volume of wood in steres to convert

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume of wood in steres to convert
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Holzvolumen in Ster, das umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de bois en stères à convertir
businessContext_i18n.es: El volumen de madera en estéreos a convertir

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor, typically 1 stere = 1 m³. Adjust for specific stacking variants.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor, typically 1 stere = 1 m³. Adjust for specific stacking variants.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm faktörü, tipik olarak 1 ster = 1 m³. Belirli istifleme varyantları için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor, typischerweise 1 Ster = 1 m³. Für spezifische Stapelvarianten anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion, généralement 1 stère = 1 m³. Ajuster pour les variantes d'empilage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión, típicamente 1 estéreo = 1 m³. Ajustar para variantes de apilamiento específicas.

inputs.label: Stacking Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for standard stacked steres. Use 0.7–0.8 for loose chainsaw chips.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for standard stacked steres. Use 0.7–0.8 for loose chainsaw chips.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart istiflenmiş sterler için 1.0. Gevşek zincir talaşı için 0.7–0.8 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1,0 für standardmäßig gestapelte Ster. 0,7–0,8 für lose Kettensägen-Hackschnitzel verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1,0 pour les stères empilés standard. Utilisez 0,7–0,8 pour les copeaux de tronçonneuse en vrac.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1.0 para estéreos apilados estándar. Usar 0.7–0.8 para astillas sueltas de motosierra.

inputs.label: Price per Stere
inputs.businessContext: Optional: price per stere for cost calculations

businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: maliyet hesaplamaları için ster başına fiyat
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: Preis pro Ster für Kostenberechnungen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : prix par stère pour les calculs de coût
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcional: precio por estéreo para cálculos de coste

inputs.label: Price per Cubic Meter
inputs.businessContext: Optional: price per cubic meter for cost comparison

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: price per cubic meter for cost comparison
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: maliyet karşılaştırması için metreküp başına fiyat
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: Preis pro Kubikmeter für Kostenvergleich
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : prix par mètre cube pour comparaison de coût
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcional: precio por metro cúbico para comparación de costes
